decisions.title: Name files with *asterisks* and _underscores_
decisions.rationale: Markdown chars [#, *, _, [, ]] in user strings pass through verbatim

artifacts.name: weird [name] (with) parens
artifacts.body:
# This looks like a heading but is inside a code fence
> and this is not a blockquote

open_questions.question: What about trailing spaces?
open_questions.context: Authored intent is preserved; renderer does not trim user strings
